title: phonus fruticosus
intro: Phonus fruticosus, also known as the Gardenia or Cape Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Phonus fruticosus include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
